description: Phase 7 — Meta-Review: P_p reviewer (fused Persona) + closed experimental record injection reads full d5 paper. Tests whether the working tool produces scorable, high-quality structural critique independent of the authors. Retroactively designated from temp.local/meta-review-check full-run after confirming results are scorable.
notes: Single-variant experiment. Variant: B (fused) Persona from temp.local/meta-review-check/variants/B-fused.md, expanded with {{FINDINGS}} injection slot and full EXPERIMENTAL RECORD section. Paper: parc_d5.md (~82K chars, ~24K tokens estimated input). Findings injection: findings-closed.md (~9K chars) — confirmed results and falsified hypotheses only, no closure framing. Design intent: reviewer has the experimental record as context and discovers open questions independently. Comparison baseline: exp-06 A-runs (P_p reviewer on d2, mean 3.0/5 primary criteria, 5 runs).
